intro: A running list of the hardware, software, and services I rely on to build, write, and stay organized.

items.name: MacBook Pro 14-inch (M4 Pro)
items.note: Primary dev machine for everything that I do.

items.name: iPhone 17 Pro Max
items.note: Daily driver and more than enough for a quick capture.

items.name: Keychron K8 Pro
items.note: Mechanical keyboard for long sessions. Blue Switches. Click-clacky af.

items.name: Logitech G402
items.note: Got this as a gift back when I used to grind CSGO. Still going strong.

items.name: Apple Trackpad
items.note: For all the stuff that the mouse cannot do.

items.name: Apple Earpods
items.note: Yes, you read that right. I use Apple Earpods. They are the best in the market. Period.

items.name: Dell S2725QC
items.note: 4K monitor. USB-C PD Charging. 120Hz. More than enough for my needs.

items.name: Satechi Thunderbolt 4 Dock
items.note: This enables a one-cable switchout between my work and home setup, and keeps my desk clean.

items.name: AKG Lyra
items.note: Good mic for any calls, recordings or podcasts that I do.

items.name: Lumina 4K Webcam
items.note: Great webcam for WFH calls. I funded the project on Kickstarter.

items.name: Ikea Trotten desk
items.note: Great, spacious and a subtle desk to suit my needs.

items.name: Herman Miller Mirra
items.note: After using a gaming chair for years, I switched to this and it has been good for my aging back.

items.name: Ikea Elloven Desk Shelf
items.note: Despite my monitor having height adjustment, I use this to keep my desk clean from small stuff.

sections.title: Terminal and dev tools
sections.description: The core stack I touch every day.

items.name: Xcode
items.note: Primary IDE for iOS development. I use this almost every minute of my working hours.

items.name: Cursor
items.note: Primary editor for all my AI Experiments.

items.name: Warp & Ghostty
items.note: I use these two alternatively while I finally transition to using Ghostty as my primary terminal.

items.name: zsh + starship
items.note: My preferred shell and prompt.

items.name: Figma
items.note: Anything design related.

items.name: Obsidian
items.note: Trying to use this more and more to take notes and manage my life.

items.name: Spotify
items.note: Just getting in the zone, creating vibes and getting work done.
